# undivisible.dev

> Max Carter (undivisible) — software systems, AI automation, low-level tooling. **Agents: GET the markdown files below** (static hosting; same bytes as curl).

Hosted on GitHub Pages: these are real files in the deploy bundle, not HTML wrappers.

## Markdown (fetch directly)

- [Full bundle](https://example.test/llms-full.txt): Agent guide, profile/current projects, and resume in one Markdown request.
- [Now / profile](https://example.test/now.md): Projects and current focus.
- [Resume](https://example.test/resume.md): Experience, skills, contact.
- [Agent how-to](https://example.test/agent.md): Which URLs to use; static vs Cloudflare-style negotiation.

## Index

- [llms.txt](https://example.test/llms.txt): This file.
- [Agent page](https://example.test/agent): HTML link list only (no inlined content).

## Optional

- [Upstream now.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/undivisible/undivisible/main/now.md): GitHub source before deploy sync.
- [Upstream resume.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/undivisible/undivisible/main/resume.md): GitHub source before deploy sync.
